Airlinesname_1 = []
for flight in a:
    b = flight
    pattern = r'([A-Za-z\s]+)\n([A-Z0-9]{2}-\d+)'
    match = re.search(pattern, b)

    if match:
        flight_name = match.group(1)
        Airlinesname_1.append(flight_name)

import re

Airlinesname_1 = []

for flight in a:

    b = flight

    pattern = r'([A-Za-z\s]+)\n([A-Z0-9]{2}-\d+)'

    match = re.search(pattern, b)

    if match:

        flight_name = match.group(1).strip()

        Airlinesname_1.append(flight_name)

print(Airlinesname_1)

[]
In [24]:
import re

Airlinesname_1 = []

for flight in a:

    b = str(flight)

    pattern = r'([A-Za-z ]+)\s*\n\s*([A-Z0-9]+[- ]?\d+)'

    match = re.search(pattern, b)

    if match:

        flight_name = match.group(1).strip()

        # Remove unwanted text
        flight_name = flight_name.replace("Enjoy Free Meals", "").strip()

        Airlinesname_1.append(flight_name)

print(Airlinesname_1)

[]

In [29]:
import re

Airlinesname_1 = []

for flight in flights:

    pattern = r'([A-Za-z ]+)\s*\n\s*([A-Z0-9]{2}-\d+)'

    match = re.search(pattern, flight)

    if match:

        flight_name = match.group(1).strip()

        flight_name = flight_name.replace("Enjoy Free Meals", "").strip()

        Airlinesname_1.append(flight_name)

print(Airlinesname_1)

['IndiGo']

from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC

cards = WebDriverWait(driver,20).until(

    EC.presence_of_all_elements_located(
        (By.CLASS_NAME,"nw_listing_bx_tp.d-flex.align-items-start.justify-content-between.ng-tns-c112315503-0")
    )
)
In [31]:
from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
import time
import re
import pandas as pd

driver = webdriver.Chrome()

driver.get("https://www.easemytrip.com/flight-search/listing?srch=HYD-Hyderabad-India%7CBOM-Mumbai-India%7C30%2F05%2F2026&px=1-0-0&cbn=0&ar=undefined&isow=true&isdm=true&lang=en-us&IsDoubleSeat=false&CCODE=IN&curr=INR&apptype=B2C")

time.sleep(8)

# Scroll till all flights load
last_height = driver.execute_script(
    "return document.body.scrollHeight"
)

while True:

    # Scroll down
    driver.execute_script(
        "window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight);"
    )

    time.sleep(5)

    # Get new height
    new_height = driver.execute_script(
        "return document.body.scrollHeight"
    )

    # Stop if no new records loaded
    if new_height == last_height:
        break

    last_height = new_height
In [ ]:
# NOW extract all cards
cards = driver.find_elements(
    By.CLASS_NAME,
    "nw_listing_bx_tp.d-flex.align-items-start.justify-content-between.ng-tns-c112315503-0"
)

print("Total Records:", len(cards))

# -----------------------------
# YOUR EXTRACTION CODE
# -----------------------------

airline_list = []
flightcode_list = []
departure_list = []
source_list = []
duration_list = []
stops_list = []
arrival_list = []
destination_list = []
price_list = []

for card in cards:

    text = card.text

    # Flight Code
    code = re.findall(r'[A-Z0-9]{2,3}-?\d+', text)

    flightcode_list.append(code[0] if code else None)

    # Times
    times = re.findall(r'\d{2}:\d{2}', text)

    departure_list.append(times[0] if len(times) > 0 else None)

    arrival_list.append(times[1] if len(times) > 1 else None)

    # Duration
    dur = re.findall(r'\d+h\s\d+m', text)

    duration_list.append(dur[0] if dur else None)

    # Stops
    stop = re.findall(r'Nonstop|\d+\sStop', text)

    stops_list.append(stop[0] if stop else None)

    # Price
    price = re.findall(r'₹[\d,]+', text)

    price_list.append(price[0] if price else None)

    # Airline
    lines = text.split("\n")

    airline = None

    for i in lines:

        if re.match(r'[A-Z0-9]{2,3}-?\d+', i):

            index = lines.index(i)

            if index > 0:
                airline = lines[index-1]

            break

    airline_list.append(airline)

    # Source and Destination
    cities = []

    for line in lines:

        if (
            "Stop" not in line and
            "Book" not in line and
            "Seats" not in line and
            "offer" not in line and
            "₹" not in line and
            not re.search(r'\d', line)
        ):

            cities.append(line.strip())

    source_list.append(cities[1] if len(cities) > 1 else None)

    destination_list.append(cities[2] if len(cities) > 2 else None)

# DataFrame
df_12 = pd.DataFrame({

    "Airline": airline_list,
    "Flight Code": flightcode_list,
    "Departure": departure_list,
    "Source": source_list,
    "Duration": duration_list,
    "Stops": stops_list,
    "Arrival": arrival_list,
    "Destination": destination_list,
    "Price": price_list
})

df_1
In [34]:
driver = webdriver.Chrome()
driver.get("https://www.easemytrip.com/flight-search/listing?srch=DEL-New%20Delhi-India%7CBOM-Mumbai-India%7C17%2F09%2F2026-19%2F09%2F2026&px=1-0-0&cbn=0&ar=undefined&isow=false&isdm=true&lang=en-us&IsDoubleSeat=false&CCODE=IN&curr=INR&apptype=B2C")
time.sleep(8)
# Scroll till all flights load
last_height = driver.execute_script(
    "return document.body.scrollHeight"
)
while True:
# Scroll down
    driver.execute_script(
        "window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight);"
    )

    time.sleep(5)

    # Get new height
    new_height = driver.execute_script(
        "return document.body.scrollHeight"
    )

    # Stop if no new records loaded
    if new_height == last_height:
        break

    last_height = new_height
In [153]:
driver = webdriver.Chrome()
driver.get("https://www.easemytrip.com/flight-search/listing?srch=DEL-New%20Delhi-India%7CHYD-Hyderabad-India%7C17%2F09%2F2026-19%2F09%2F2026&px=1-0-0&cbn=0&ar=undefined&isow=false&isdm=true&lang=en-us&IsDoubleSeat=false&CCODE=IN&curr=INR&apptype=B2C")
time.sleep(8)
# Scroll till all flights load
last_height = driver.execute_script(
    "return document.body.scrollHeight"
)
while True:
# Scroll down
    driver.execute_script(
        "window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight);"
    )

    time.sleep(5)

    # Get new height
    new_height = driver.execute_script(
        "return document.body.scrollHeight"
    )

    # Stop if no new records loaded
    if new_height == last_height:
        break

    last_height = new_height
In [ ]:
# NOW extract all cards
cards = driver.find_elements(
    By.CLASS_NAME,
    "nw_listing_bx_tp.d-flex.align-items-start.justify-content-between.outBondDiv.ng-tns-c1019213067-0"
)

print("Total Records:", len(cards))

# -----------------------------
# YOUR EXTRACTION CODE
# -----------------------------

airline_list = []
flightcode_list = []
departure_list = []
source_list = []
duration_list = []
stops_list = []
arrival_list = []
destination_list = []
price_list = []

for card in cards:

    text = card.text

    # Flight Code
    code = re.findall(r'[A-Z0-9]{2,3}-?\d+', text)

    flightcode_list.append(code[0] if code else None)

    # Times
    times = re.findall(r'\d{2}:\d{2}', text)

    departure_list.append(times[0] if len(times) > 0 else None)

    arrival_list.append(times[1] if len(times) > 1 else None)

    # Duration
    dur = re.findall(r'\d+h\s\d+m', text)

    duration_list.append(dur[0] if dur else None)

    # Stops
    stop = re.findall(r'Nonstop|\d+\sStop', text)

    stops_list.append(stop[0] if stop else None)

    # Price
    price = re.findall(r'₹[\d,]+', text)

    price_list.append(price[0] if price else None)

    # Airline
    lines = text.split("\n")

    airline = None

    for i in lines:

        if re.match(r'[A-Z0-9]{2,3}-?\d+', i):

            index = lines.index(i)

            if index > 0:
                airline = lines[index-1]

            break

    airline_list.append(airline)

    # Source and Destination
    cities = []

    for line in lines:

        if (
            "Stop" not in line and
            "Book" not in line and
            "Seats" not in line and
            "offer" not in line and
            "₹" not in line and
            not re.search(r'\d', line)
        ):

            cities.append(line.strip())

    source_list.append(cities[1] if len(cities) > 1 else None)

    destination_list.append(cities[2] if len(cities) > 2 else None)

# DataFrame
df_1 = pd.DataFrame({

    "Airline": airline_list,
    "Flight Code": flightcode_list,
    "Departure": departure_list,
    "Source": source_list,
    "Duration": duration_list,
    "Stops": stops_list,
    "Arrival": arrival_list,
    "Destination": destination_list,
    "Price": price_list
})

df_1
In [ ]:
driver = webdriver.Chrome()
driver.get("https://www.easemytrip.com/flight-search/listing?srch=HYD-Hyderabad-India%7CDEL-New%20Delhi-India%7C17%2F09%2F2026-19%2F09%2F2026&px=1-0-0&cbn=0&ar=undefined&isow=false&isdm=true&lang=en-us&IsDoubleSeat=false&CCODE=IN&curr=INR&apptype=B2C")
time.sleep(8)
# Scroll till all flights load
last_height = driver.execute_script(
    "return document.body.scrollHeight"
)

while True:

    # Scroll down
    driver.execute_script(
        "window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight);"
    )

    time.sleep(5)

    # Get new height
    new_height = driver.execute_script(
        "return document.body.scrollHeight"
    )

    # Stop if no new records loaded
    if new_height == last_height:
        break

    last_height = new_height

time.sleep(8)

# Scroll till all flights load
last_height = driver.execute_script(
    "return document.body.scrollHeight"
)

while True:

    # Scroll down
    driver.execute_script(
        "window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight);"
    )

    time.sleep(5)

    # Get new height
    new_height = driver.execute_script(
        "return document.body.scrollHeight"
    )

    # Stop if no new records loaded
    if new_height == last_height:
        break

    last_height = new_height

# NOW extract all cards
cards = driver.find_elements(

)

print("Total Records:", len(cards))

# -----------------------------
# YOUR EXTRACTION CODE
# -----------------------------

airline_list = []
flightcode_list = []
departure_list = []
source_list = []
duration_list = []
stops_list = []
arrival_list = []
destination_list = []
price_list = []

for card in cards:

    text = card.text

    # Flight Code
    code = re.findall(r'[A-Z0-9]{2,3}-?\d+', text)

    flightcode_list.append(code[0] if code else None)

    # Times
    times = re.findall(r'\d{2}:\d{2}', text)

    departure_list.append(times[0] if len(times) > 0 else None)

    arrival_list.append(times[1] if len(times) > 1 else None)

    # Duration
    dur = re.findall(r'\d+h\s\d+m', text)

    duration_list.append(dur[0] if dur else None)

    # Stops
    stop = re.findall(r'Nonstop|\d+\sStop', text)

    stops_list.append(stop[0] if stop else None)

    # Price
    price = re.findall(r'₹[\d,]+', text)

    price_list.append(price[0] if price else None)

    # Airline
    lines = text.split("\n")

    airline = None

    for i in lines:

        if re.match(r'[A-Z0-9]{2,3}-?\d+', i):

            index = lines.index(i)

            if index > 0:
                airline = lines[index-1]

            break

    airline_list.append(airline)

    # Source and Destination
    cities = []

    for line in lines:

        if (
            "Stop" not in line and
            "Book" not in line and
            "Seats" not in line and
            "offer" not in line and
            "₹" not in line and
            not re.search(r'\d', line)
        ):

            cities.append(line.strip())

    source_list.append(cities[1] if len(cities) > 1 else None)

    destination_list.append(cities[2] if len(cities) > 2 else None)

# DataFrame
df_3 = pd.DataFrame({

    "Airline": airline_list,
    "Flight Code": flightcode_list,
    "Departure": departure_list,
    "Source": source_list,
    "Duration": duration_list,
    "Stops": stops_list,
    "Arrival": arrival_list,
    "Destination": destination_list,
    "Price": price_list
})

df_3

# NOW extract all cards
cards = driver.find_elements(
    By.CLASS_NAME,
    "nw_listing_bx_tp.d-flex.align-items-start.justify-content-between.ng-tns-c112315503-0"
)
print("Total Records:", len(cards))

airline_list = []
flightcode_list = []
departure_list = []
source_list = []
duration_list = []
stops_list = []
arrival_list = []
destination_list = []
price_list = []

for card in cards:

    text = card.text

    # Flight Code
    code = re.findall(r'[A-Z0-9]{2,3}-?\d+', text)

    flightcode_list.append(code[0] if code else None)

    # Times
    times = re.findall(r'\d{2}:\d{2}', text)

    departure_list.append(times[0] if len(times) > 0 else None)

    arrival_list.append(times[1] if len(times) > 1 else None)

    # Duration
    dur = re.findall(r'\d+h\s\d+m', text)

    duration_list.append(dur[0] if dur else None)

    # Stops
    stop = re.findall(r'Nonstop|\d+\sStop', text)

    stops_list.append(stop[0] if stop else None)

    # Price
    price = re.findall(r'₹[\d,]+', text)

    price_list.append(price[0] if price else None)

    # Airline
    lines = text.split("\n")

    airline = None

    for i in lines:

        if re.match(r'[A-Z0-9]{2,3}-?\d+', i):

            index = lines.index(i)

            if index > 0:
                airline = lines[index-1]

            break

    airline_list.append(airline)

    # Source and Destination
    cities = []

    for line in lines:

        if (
            "Stop" not in line and
            "Book" not in line and
            "Seats" not in line and
            "offer" not in line and
            "₹" not in line and
            not re.search(r'\d', line)
        ):

            cities.append(line.strip())

    source_list.append(cities[1] if len(cities) > 1 else None)

    destination_list.append(cities[2] if len(cities) > 2 else None)

# DataFrame
df_4 = pd.DataFrame({

    "Airline": airline_list,
    "Flight Code": flightcode_list,
    "Departure": departure_list,
    "Source": source_list,
    "Duration": duration_list,
    "Stops": stops_list,
    "Arrival": arrival_list,
    "Destination": destination_list,
    "Price": price_list
})

driver.get("https://www.easemytrip.com/flight-search/listing?srch=DEL-New%20Delhi-India%7CGOI-Goa-India%7C17%2F09%2F2026-19%2F09%2F2026&px=1-0-0&cbn=0&ar=undefined&isow=false&isdm=true&lang=en-us&IsDoubleSeat=false&CCODE=IN&curr=INR&apptype=B2C")
# Scroll till all flights load
last_height = driver.execute_script(
    "return document.body.scrollHeight"
)

while True:

    # Scroll down
    driver.execute_script(
        "window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight);"
    )

    time.sleep(5)

    # Get new height
    new_height = driver.execute_script(
        "return document.body.scrollHeight"
    )

        break

airline_list = []
flightcode_list = []
departure_list = []
source_list = []
duration_list = []
stops_list = []
arrival_list = []
destination_list = []
price_list = []

for card in cards:

    text = card.text

    # Flight Code
    code = re.findall(r'[A-Z0-9]{2,3}-?\d+', text)

    flightcode_list.append(code[0] if code else None)

    # Times
    times = re.findall(r'\d{2}:\d{2}', text)

    departure_list.append(times[0] if len(times) > 0 else None)

    arrival_list.append(times[1] if len(times) > 1 else None)

    # Duration
    dur = re.findall(r'\d+h\s\d+m', text)

    duration_list.append(dur[0] if dur else None)

    # Stops
    stop = re.findall(r'Nonstop|\d+\sStop', text)

    stops_list.append(stop[0] if stop else None)

    # Price
    price = re.findall(r'₹[\d,]+', text)

    price_list.append(price[0] if price else None)

    # Airline
    lines = text.split("\n")

    airline = None

    for i in lines:

        if re.match(r'[A-Z0-9]{2,3}-?\d+', i):

            index = lines.index(i)

            if index > 0:
                airline = lines[index-1]

            break

    airline_list.append(airline)

    # Source and Destination
    cities = []

    for line in lines:

        if (
            "Stop" not in line and
            "Book" not in line and
            "Seats" not in line and
            "offer" not in line and
            "₹" not in line and
            not re.search(r'\d', line)
        ):

            cities.append(line.strip())

    source_list.append(cities[1] if len(cities) > 1 else None)

    destination_list.append(cities[2] if len(cities) > 2 else None)

driver = webdriver.Chrome()

driver.get("https://www.easemytrip.com/flight-search/listing?srch=MAA-Chennai-India%7CGOI-Goa-India%7C17%2F09%2F2026&px=1-0-0&cbn=0&ar=undefined&isow=true&isdm=true&lang=en-us&IsDoubleSeat=false&CCODE=IN&curr=INR&apptype=B2C")
# Scroll till all flights load
last_height = driver.execute_script(
    "return document.body.scrollHeight"
)

while True:

    # Scroll down
    driver.execute_script(
        "window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight);"
    )

    time.sleep(5)

    # Get new height
    new_height = driver.execute_script(
        "return document.body.scrollHeight"
    )

    # Stop if no new records loaded
    if new_height == last_height:
        break

    last_height = new_height

time.sleep(8)

    "return document.body.scrollHeight"
)

    )

    # Stop if no new records loaded

    last_height = new_height

airline_list = []
flightcode_list = []
departure_list = []
source_list = []
duration_list = []
stops_list = []
arrival_list = []
destination_list = []
price_list = []

for card in cards:

    text = card.text

    # Flight Code
    code = re.findall(r'[A-Z0-9]{2,3}-?\d+', text)

    flightcode_list.append(code[0] if code else None)

    # Times
    times = re.findall(r'\d{2}:\d{2}', text)

    departure_list.append(times[0] if len(times) > 0 else None)

    arrival_list.append(times[1] if len(times) > 1 else None)

    # Duration
    dur = re.findall(r'\d+h\s\d+m', text)

    duration_list.append(dur[0] if dur else None)

    # Stops
    stop = re.findall(r'Nonstop|\d+\sStop', text)

    stops_list.append(stop[0] if stop else None)

    # Price
    price = re.findall(r'₹[\d,]+', text)

    price_list.append(price[0] if price else None)

    # Airline
    lines = text.split("\n")

    airline = None

    for i in lines:

        if re.match(r'[A-Z0-9]{2,3}-?\d+', i):

            index = lines.index(i)

            if index > 0:
                airline = lines[index-1]

            break

    airline_list.append(airline)

    # Source and Destination
    cities = []

    for line in lines:

        if (
            "Stop" not in line and
            "Book" not in line and
            "Seats" not in line and
            "offer" not in line and
            "₹" not in line and
            not re.search(r'\d', line)
        ):

            cities.append(line.strip())

    source_list.append(cities[1] if len(cities) > 1 else None)

    destination_list.append(cities[2] if len(cities) > 2 else None)

# DataFrame

driver = webdriver.Chrome()

driver.get("https://www.easemytrip.com/flight-search/listing?srch=BOM-Mumbai-India%7CGOI-Goa-India%7C17%2F09%2F2026-18%2F09%2F2026&px=1-0-0&cbn=0&ar=undefined&isow=false&isdm=true&lang=en-us&IsDoubleSeat=false&CCODE=IN&curr=INR&apptype=B2C")
# Scroll till all flights load
last_height = driver.execute_script(
    "return document.body.scrollHeight"
)

while True:

    # Scroll down
    driver.execute_script(
        "window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight);"
    )

    time.sleep(5)

    # Get new height
    new_height = driver.execute_script(
        "return document.body.scrollHeight"
    )

    # Stop if no new records loaded
    if new_height == last_height:
        break

    last_height = new_height

time.sleep(8)

# Scroll till all flights load
last_height = driver.execute_script(
    "return document.body.scrollHeight"
)

while True:

    # Scroll down
    driver.execute_script(
        "window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight);"
    )

    time.sleep(5)

    # Get new height
    new_height = driver.execute_script(
        "return document.body.scrollHeight"
    )

    # Stop if no new records loaded
    if new_height == last_height:
        break

    last_height = new_height
In [61]:
cards = driver.find_elements(
    By.CLASS_NAME,
    "nw_listing_bx_tp.d-flex.align-items-start.justify-content-between.outBondDiv.ng-tns-c1019213067-0"
)
print("Total Records:", len(cards))
airline_list = []
flightcode_list = []
departure_list = []
source_list = []
duration_list = []
stops_list = []
arrival_list = []
destination_list = []
price_list = []

for card in cards:

    text = card.text

    # Flight Code
    code = re.findall(r'[A-Z0-9]{2,3}-?\d+', text)

    flightcode_list.append(code[0] if code else None)

    # Times
    times = re.findall(r'\d{2}:\d{2}', text)

    departure_list.append(times[0] if len(times) > 0 else None)

    arrival_list.append(times[1] if len(times) > 1 else None)

    # Duration
    dur = re.findall(r'\d+h\s\d+m', text)

    duration_list.append(dur[0] if dur else None)

    # Stops
    stop = re.findall(r'Nonstop|\d+\sStop', text)

    stops_list.append(stop[0] if stop else None)

    # Price
    price = re.findall(r'₹[\d,]+', text)

    price_list.append(price[0] if price else None)

    # Airline
    lines = text.split("\n")

    airline = None

    for i in lines:

        if re.match(r'[A-Z0-9]{2,3}-?\d+', i):

            index = lines.index(i)

            if index > 0:
                airline = lines[index-1]

            break

    airline_list.append(airline)

    # Source and Destination
    cities = []

    for line in lines:

        if (
            "Stop" not in line and
            "Book" not in line and
            "Seats" not in line and
            "offer" not in line and
            "₹" not in line and
            not re.search(r'\d', line)
        ):

            cities.append(line.strip())

    source_list.append(cities[1] if len(cities) > 1 else None)

    destination_list.append(cities[2] if len(cities) > 2 else None)

# DataFrame
df_7 = pd.DataFrame({

    "Airline": airline_list,
    "Flight Code": flightcode_list,
    "Departure": departure_list,
    "Source": source_list,
    "Duration": duration_list,
    "Stops": stops_list,
    "Arrival": arrival_list,
    "Destination": destination_list,
    "Price": price_list
})

df_7

driver = webdriver.Chrome()

driver.get("https://www.easemytrip.com/flight-search/listing?srch=DEL-Delhi-India%7CCCU-Kolkata-India%7C23%2F10%2F2026-25%2F10%2F2026&px=1-0-0&cbn=0&ar=undefined&isow=false&isdm=true&lang=en-us&utm_campaign=788997081&utm_source=g_c&utm_medium=cpc&utm_term=e_easemytrip&adgroupid=39319940377&gad_source=1&gad_campaignid=788997081&gbraid=0AAAAADo_0-iXrVI0EENYGySXASzqNuSH3&gclid=CjwKCAjw8uTQBhAdEiwAVvtJyryrZ7TaNvfCW10vi-mRj8_opVmLdINoyY_ZWOCLoS7BzoILeWNwzRoCHl4QAvD_BwE&IsDoubleSeat=false&CCODE=IN&curr=INR&apptype=B2C")
# Scroll till all flights load
last_height = driver.execute_script(
    "return document.body.scrollHeight"
)

while True:

    # Scroll down
    driver.execute_script(
        "window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight);"
    )

    time.sleep(5)

    # Get new height
    new_height = driver.execute_script(
        "return document.body.scrollHeight"
    )

    # Stop if no new records loaded
    if new_height == last_height:
        break

    last_height = new_height

time.sleep(8)

# Scroll till all flights load
last_height = driver.execute_script(
    "return document.body.scrollHeight"
)

while True:

    # Scroll down
    driver.execute_script(
        "window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight);"
    )

    time.sleep(5)

    # Get new height
    new_height = driver.execute_script(
        "return document.body.scrollHeight"
    )

    # Stop if no new records loaded
    if new_height == last_height:
        break

    last_height = new_height

cards = driver.find_elements(
    By.CLASS_NAME,
    'nw_listing_bx_tp.d-flex.align-items-start.justify-content-between.outBondDiv.ng-tns-c1019213067-0'
)
print("Total Records:", len(cards))
airline_list = []
flightcode_list = []
departure_list = []
source_list = []
duration_list = []
stops_list = []
arrival_list = []
destination_list = []
price_list = []

for card in cards:

    text = card.text

    # Flight Code
    code = re.findall(r'[A-Z0-9]{2,3}-?\d+', text)

    flightcode_list.append(code[0] if code else None)

    # Times
    times = re.findall(r'\d{2}:\d{2}', text)

    departure_list.append(times[0] if len(times) > 0 else None)

    arrival_list.append(times[1] if len(times) > 1 else None)

    # Duration
    dur = re.findall(r'\d+h\s\d+m', text)

    duration_list.append(dur[0] if dur else None)

    # Stops
    stop = re.findall(r'Nonstop|\d+\sStop', text)

    stops_list.append(stop[0] if stop else None)

    # Price
    price = re.findall(r'₹[\d,]+', text)

    price_list.append(price[0] if price else None)

    # Airline
    lines = text.split("\n")

    airline = None

    for i in lines:

        if re.match(r'[A-Z0-9]{2,3}-?\d+', i):

            index = lines.index(i)

            if index > 0:
                airline = lines[index-1]

            break

    airline_list.append(airline)

    # Source and Destination
    cities = []

    for line in lines:

        if (
            "Stop" not in line and
            "Book" not in line and
            "Seats" not in line and
            "offer" not in line and
            "₹" not in line and
            not re.search(r'\d', line)
        ):

            cities.append(line.strip())

    source_list.append(cities[1] if len(cities) > 1 else None)

    destination_list.append(cities[2] if len(cities) > 2 else None)

# DataFrame

    "Airline": airline_list,

    "Source": source_list,

})

arrival_list = []
destination_list = []
price_list = []

for card in cards:

    text = card.text

    # Flight Code
    code = re.findall(r'[A-Z0-9]{2,3}-?\d+', text)

    flightcode_list.append(code[0] if code else None)

    # Times
    times = re.findall(r'\d{2}:\d{2}', text)

    departure_list.append(times[0] if len(times) > 0 else None)

    arrival_list.append(times[1] if len(times) > 1 else None)

    # Duration
    dur = re.findall(r'\d+h\s\d+m', text)

    duration_list.append(dur[0] if dur else None)

    # Stops
    stop = re.findall(r'Nonstop|\d+\sStop', text)

    stops_list.append(stop[0] if stop else None)

    price = re.findall(r'₹[\d,]+', text)

    price_list.append(price[0] if price else None)

    # Airline

    airline = None

    for i in lines:

        if re.match(r'[A-Z0-9]{2,3}-?\d+', i):

            index = lines.index(i)

            if index > 0:
                airline = lines[index-1]

            break

    airline_list.append(airline)

    # Source and Destination

    for line in lines:

        if (
            "Stop" not in line and
            "Book" not in line and
            "Seats" not in line and
            "offer" not in line and

driver = webdriver.Chrome()
driver.get("https://www.easemytrip.com/flight-search/listing?srch=HYD-Hyderabad-India%7CBKK-Bangkok-Thailand%7C23%2F10%2F2026-25%2F10%2F2026&px=1-0-0&cbn=0&ar=undefined&isow=false&isdm=false&lang=en-us&IsDoubleSeat=false&CCODE=IN&curr=INR&apptype=B2C")
# Scroll till all flights load
last_height = driver.execute_script(
    "return document.body.scrollHeight"
)

while True:

    # Scroll down
    driver.execute_script(
        "window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight);"
    )

    time.sleep(5)

    # Get new height

cards = driver.find_elements(
    By.CLASS_NAME,
    "radio_label"
)
print("Total Records:", len(cards))
airline_list = []
flightcode_list = []
departure_list = []
source_list = []
duration_list = []
stops_list = []
arrival_list = []
destination_list = []
price_list = []

for card in cards:

    text = card.text

    # Flight Code
    code = re.findall(r'[A-Z0-9]{2,3}-?\d+', text)

    flightcode_list.append(code[0] if code else None)

    # Times
    times = re.findall(r'\d{2}:\d{2}', text)

    departure_list.append(times[0] if len(times) > 0 else None)

    arrival_list.append(times[1] if len(times) > 1 else None)

    # Duration
    dur = re.findall(r'\d+h\s\d+m', text)

    duration_list.append(dur[0] if dur else None)

    # Stops
    stop = re.findall(r'Nonstop|\d+\sStop', text)

    stops_list.append(stop[0] if stop else None)

    # Price
    price = re.findall(r'₹[\d,]+', text)

    price_list.append(price[0] if price else None)

    # Airline
    lines = text.split("\n")

    airline = None

    for i in lines:

        if re.match(r'[A-Z0-9]{2,3}-?\d+', i):

            index = lines.index(i)

            if index > 0:
                airline = lines[index-1]

            break

    airline_list.append(airline)

    # Source and Destination
    cities = []

    for line in lines:

        if (
            "Stop" not in line and
            "Book" not in line and
            "Seats" not in line and
            "offer" not in line and
            "₹" not in line and
            not re.search(r'\d', line)
        ):

            cities.append(line.strip())

    source_list.append(cities[1] if len(cities) > 1 else None)

    destination_list.append(cities[2] if len(cities) > 2 else None)

# DataFrame
df_10 = pd.DataFrame({

    "Airline": airline_list,
    "Flight Code": flightcode_list,
    "Departure": departure_list,
    "Source": source_list,
    "Duration": duration_list,
    "Stops": stops_list,
    "Arrival": arrival_list,
    "Destination": destination_list,
    "Price": price_list
})

    time.sleep(5)

    # Get new height
    new_height = driver.execute_script(
        "return document.body.scrollHeight"
    )

    # Stop if no new records loaded
    if new_height == last_height:
        break

    last_height = new_height

# Scroll till all flights load

    "return document.body.scrollHeight"
)

    )

    time.sleep(5)

    # Get new height

    )

    # Stop if no new records loaded
    if new_height == last_height:

In [81]:
cards = driver.find_elements(
    By.CLASS_NAME,
    "radio_label"
)
print("Total Records:", len(cards))
airline_list = []
flightcode_list = []
departure_list = []
source_list = []
duration_list = []
stops_list = []
arrival_list = []
destination_list = []
price_list = []

for card in cards:

    text = card.text

    # Flight Code
    code = re.findall(r'[A-Z0-9]{2,3}-?\d+', text)

    flightcode_list.append(code[0] if code else None)

    # Times
    times = re.findall(r'\d{2}:\d{2}', text)

    departure_list.append(times[0] if len(times) > 0 else None)

    arrival_list.append(times[1] if len(times) > 1 else None)

    # Duration
    dur = re.findall(r'\d+h\s\d+m', text)

    duration_list.append(dur[0] if dur else None)

    # Stops
    stop = re.findall(r'Nonstop|\d+\sStop', text)

    stops_list.append(stop[0] if stop else None)

    # Price
    price = re.findall(r'₹[\d,]+', text)

    price_list.append(price[0] if price else None)

    # Airline
    lines = text.split("\n")

    airline = None

    for i in lines:

        if re.match(r'[A-Z0-9]{2,3}-?\d+', i):

            index = lines.index(i)

            if index > 0:
                airline = lines[index-1]

            break

    airline_list.append(airline)

    # Source and Destination
    cities = []

    for line in lines:

        if (
            "Stop" not in line and
            "Book" not in line and
            "Seats" not in line and
            "offer" not in line and
            "₹" not in line and
            not re.search(r'\d', line)
        ):

            cities.append(line.strip())

    source_list.append(cities[1] if len(cities) > 1 else None)

    destination_list.append(cities[2] if len(cities) > 2 else None)

# DataFrame
df_2 = pd.DataFrame({

    "Airline": airline_list,
    "Flight Code": flightcode_list,
    "Departure": departure_list,
    "Source": source_list,
    "Duration": duration_list,
    "Stops": stops_list,
    "Arrival": arrival_list,
    "Destination": destination_list,
    "Price": price_list
})

df_2

In [84]:
driver = webdriver.Chrome()
driver.get("https://www.easemytrip.com/flight-search/listing?srch=SIN-Singapore-Singapore%7CKTM-Kathmandu-Nepal%7C23%2F10%2F2026-25%2F10%2F2026&px=1-0-0&cbn=0&ar=undefined&isow=false&isdm=false&lang=en-us&IsDoubleSeat=false&CCODE=IN&curr=INR&apptype=B2C")
last_height = driver.execute_script(
    "return document.body.scrollHeight"
)

while True:

    # Scroll down
    driver.execute_script(
        "window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight);"
    )

    time.sleep(5)

    # Get new height
    new_height = driver.execute_script(
        "return document.body.scrollHeight"
    )

    # Stop if no new records loaded
    if new_height == last_height:
        break

    last_height = new_height

time.sleep(8)

# Scroll till all flights load
last_height = driver.execute_script(
    "return document.body.scrollHeight"
)

while True:

    # Scroll down
    driver.execute_script(
        "window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight);"
    )

    time.sleep(5)

    # Get new height
    new_height = driver.execute_script(
        "return document.body.scrollHeight"
    )

    # Stop if no new records loaded
    if new_height == last_height:
        break

    last_height = new_height

)

In [85]:
cards = driver.find_elements(
    By.CLASS_NAME,
    "radio_label"
)
print("Total Records:", len(cards))
airline_list = []
flightcode_list = []
departure_list = []
source_list = []
duration_list = []
stops_list = []
arrival_list = []
destination_list = []
price_list = []

for card in cards:

    text = card.text

    # Flight Code
    code = re.findall(r'[A-Z0-9]{2,3}-?\d+', text)

    flightcode_list.append(code[0] if code else None)

    # Times
    times = re.findall(r'\d{2}:\d{2}', text)

    departure_list.append(times[0] if len(times) > 0 else None)

    arrival_list.append(times[1] if len(times) > 1 else None)

    # Duration
    dur = re.findall(r'\d+h\s\d+m', text)

    duration_list.append(dur[0] if dur else None)

    # Stops
    stop = re.findall(r'Nonstop|\d+\sStop', text)

    stops_list.append(stop[0] if stop else None)

    # Price
    price = re.findall(r'₹[\d,]+', text)

    price_list.append(price[0] if price else None)

    # Airline
    lines = text.split("\n")

    airline = None

    for i in lines:

        if re.match(r'[A-Z0-9]{2,3}-?\d+', i):

            index = lines.index(i)

            if index > 0:
                airline = lines[index-1]

            break

    airline_list.append(airline)

    # Source and Destination
    cities = []

    for line in lines:

        if (
            "Stop" not in line and
            "Book" not in line and
            "Seats" not in line and
            "offer" not in line and
            "₹" not in line and
            not re.search(r'\d', line)
        ):

            cities.append(line.strip())

    source_list.append(cities[1] if len(cities) > 1 else None)

    destination_list.append(cities[2] if len(cities) > 2 else None)

# DataFrame
df_11 = pd.DataFrame({

    "Airline": airline_list,
    "Flight Code": flightcode_list,
    "Departure": departure_list,
    "Source": source_list,
    "Duration": duration_list,
    "Stops": stops_list,
    "Arrival": arrival_list,
    "Destination": destination_list,
    "Price": price_list
})

df_11

In [289]:
import pandas as pd
df['Departure_Time'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Departure'])
df['Arrival_Time'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Arrival'])
df['Duration'] = df['Arrival_Time'] - df['Departure_Time']
df['Duration_Hours'] = df['Duration'].dt.total_seconds() / 3600
# Fix next-day arrival flights
df.loc[
    df['Arrival_Time'] < df['Departure_Time'],
    'Arrival_Time'
] += pd.Timedelta(days=1)

# Calculate duration
df['Duration'] = df['Arrival_Time'] - df['Departure_Time']

print(df[['Departure_Time', 'Arrival_Time', 'Duration']].head())

       Departure_Time        Arrival_Time        Duration
0 2026-05-30 22:20:00 2026-05-31 00:15:00 0 days 01:55:00
1 2026-05-30 23:30:00 2026-05-31 01:00:00 0 days 01:30:00
2 2026-05-30 14:15:00 2026-05-30 15:55:00 0 days 01:40:00
3 2026-05-30 17:30:00 2026-05-30 18:50:00 0 days 01:20:00
4 2026-05-30 11:30:00 2026-05-30 13:25:00 0 days 01:55:00

639 rows × 12 columns

Visualization¶

Univariate Analysis¶

In [300]:
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
In [301]:
plt.figure(figsize=(10,5))
sns.histplot(df["Price"], bins=250, kde=True)
plt.title("Price Distribution")
plt.xlabel("Price")
Out[301]:
Text(0.5, 0, 'Price')
In [302]:
plt.figure(figsize=(8,5))
sns.countplot(x="Airline", data=df)

plt.title("Airline Distribution")
plt.xlabel("Airline")
plt.ylabel("Count")
plt.xticks(rotation=45)
plt.show()

Bivariate Analysis¶

Numerical vs Numerical - Duration vs Price¶

In [305]:
plt.figure(figsize=(10,5))
sns.scatterplot(x="Duration", y="Price", data=df)

plt.title("Duration vs Price")
plt.xlabel("Duration in Minutes")
plt.ylabel("Price")
plt.yticks(rotation = 90)
plt.show()

Categorical vs Categorical — Airline vs Stops¶

In [306]:
airline_stops = pd.crosstab(df["Airline"], df["Stops"])

plt.figure(figsize=(8,5))
sns.heatmap(airline_stops, annot=True, fmt="d", cmap="Blues")

plt.title("Airline vs Stops")
plt.xlabel("Stops")
plt.ylabel("Airline")
plt.show()
In [307]:
df["Duration"]= df["Duration"]

In [320]:
df["Price"] = df["Price"].str.replace(r"[₹,]", "", regex=True)
In [324]:
df['Price'] = df['Price'].astype(int)

Numerical vs Categorical — Price by Airline¶

In [314]:
plt.figure(figsize=(8,5))
sns.boxplot(x="Airline", y="Price", data=df)

plt.title("Price by Airline")
plt.xlabel("Airline")
plt.ylabel("Price")
plt.xticks(rotation=45)
plt.yticks(rotation=90)
plt.show()

Multivariate Analysis¶

Price by Airline and Stops¶

In [325]:
plt.figure(figsize=(10,5))
sns.barplot(x="Source", y="Price", data=df)

plt.title("Average Price by Airline and Stops")
plt.xlabel("Stops")
plt.ylabel("Average Price")
plt.show()
In [326]:
# ============================================
# HYPOTHESIS TESTING - 1
# Airline vs Ticket Price
# ============================================

from scipy.stats import ttest_ind

# Filter airline data
air_india = df[df["Airline"] == "Air India"]["Price"]
indigo = df[df["Airline"] == "Indigo"]["Price"]

# Perform T-Test
t_stat, p_value = ttest_ind(air_india, indigo)

print("T-Statistic:", t_stat)
print("P-Value:", p_value)

# Conclusion
alpha = 0.05

if p_value < alpha:
    print("Reject Null Hypothesis")
    print("Significant difference exists in ticket prices.")
else:
    print("Fail to Reject Null Hypothesis")
    print("No significant difference in ticket prices.")

T-Statistic: nan
P-Value: nan
Fail to Reject Null Hypothesis
No significant difference in ticket prices.
In [328]:
# ============================================
# HYPOTHESIS TESTING - 2
# Duration vs Ticket Price
# ============================================

from scipy.stats import pearsonr

# Correlation Test
corr, p_value = pearsonr(df["Duration"], df["Price"])

print("Correlation Coefficient:", corr)
print("P-Value:", p_value)

# Conclusion
alpha = 0.05

if p_value < alpha:
    print("Reject Null Hypothesis")
    print("Duration significantly affects ticket price.")
else:
    print("Fail to Reject Null Hypothesis")
    print("No significant relationship exists.")

Correlation Coefficient: 0.3970749093813506
P-Value: 1.4575408075875695e-25
Reject Null Hypothesis
Duration significantly affects ticket price.
